name: avatar
label: Avatar
description: A user avatar showing a photo, auto-generated initials from a name, or a fallback icon. Five sizes, square or circle, an optional status dot, and deterministic colors.

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL. Falls back to initials, then an icon.

props.name: name
props.description: Full name used to derive initials and the auto color.

props.name: initials
props.description: Explicit initials, overriding those derived from name.

props.name: circle
props.description: Render a full circle instead of a rounded square.

props.name: color
props.description: A soft color (blue, green, amber, rose, violet, cyan, orange, teal, pink, indigo) or 'auto' to derive one from the name.

props.name: status
props.description: Optional presence dot in the corner.
